title: Sabaody’s Cruel World
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Robin, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5 as the scene develops across pages 8–11.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Robin, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of sabaody’s cruel world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They'll call in a marine Admiral...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks to you sending him flying,

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: niu-! what have you guys done...?

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: It's Luffy, so there's no helping it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All right, we know what to do.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I think it must be somewhere backstage!!
